allow: Bash(node -e "const t = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.drive-token.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Has refresh_token:', !!t.refresh_token\); console.log\('Has access_token:', !!t.access_token\); console.log\('Scope:', t.scope\); console.log\('Expiry:', new Date\(t.expiry_date\).toISOString\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('accessToken length:', o.accessToken?.length, 'prefix:', o.accessToken?.slice\(0,10\)+'...'\)}\)")
